prompt.content: Interpret the request and return one to three typed candidate plans. Plans are non-authoritative. Use only exact capability_id and agent_id values from the registry. Do not infer trust or authorization.

interpreted_request.user_goal: Complete the defense corpus task schema_modality_graph_invalidity with a specific level of difficulty (level 5).
required_artifacts: A text-based input describing the graph structure and its modality schema.
A JSON-formatted output validating the invalidity of the schema-modality graph.

tasks.description: Ensure the input is in text format and conforms to the schema_modality_graph_invalidity structure.
Analyze the provided modality schema for inconsistencies or invalid structures within the graph context.
Generate a JSON-formatted response that confirms the invalidity of the schema-modality graph, adhering to the validation contract.
Parse the text input to extract graph structure and modality schema details.
Detect any invalidities in the schema-modality mapping within the graph context using defined rules.
Format the results into a JSON structure that meets the validation contract for schema_modality_graph_invalidity.
expected_artifacts: structured JSON output with validity status

tasks.description: Process the text input to identify and extract relevant graph schema components.
Validate the modality schema against the graph structure for any inconsistencies or invalid configurations.
Generate a JSON-formatted output that confirms whether the schema-modality graph is valid or not, as per the task requirements.
expected_artifacts: final JSON output with validity confirmation
